title: selaginella gracillima
intro: Selaginella gracillima, also known as the 'spike moss', is a type of evergreen, mat-forming plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and soothing respiratory problems. Selaginella gracillima is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for various medicinal purposes.
